outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks
outlets.summary: Witkoff and Kushner confirmed to fly to Pakistan Saturday for direct Round 2 talks with Iran FM Araghchi. Brent pulls back to $104.63. Vance on standby.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Trump is facing an increasingly patient Iran
outlets.summary: Analysis of Iran's strategic patience as Trump declares 'clock is ticking.' Iran sent FM to Islamabad but Tasnim denies negotiations with US. Bush = 3rd carrier.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth urges Iran to make deal, touts US blockade in Strait of Hormuz as 'gift to the world'
outlets.summary: At 9th Pentagon briefing Hegseth calls US war a 'gift to the world.' 'Ball is in Iran's court.' Announces USS Bush joins blockade. Says Europe 'needs Hormuz more than we do.'

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Witkoff, Kushner to head to new Iran peace talks in Pakistan
outlets.summary: White House confirms Saturday Islamabad trip. Vance on standby. Press Sec Leavitt: 'hopeful that it will be a productive conversation.' Oil retreats on prospects.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What's happening on day 56 after Trump extended ceasefire?
outlets.summary: Day 56 overview: 3-week Lebanon ceasefire extended but Israeli strike kills 2 in Touline within hours. US envoys fly to Pakistan Saturday. Brent pulls back to $104.63.

outlets.name: Reuters / RTE
outlets.headline: Witkoff and Kushner to travel to Pakistan for Iran talks
outlets.summary: US envoys Saturday trip to Islamabad for direct talks with Araghchi. Iran FM arrived Friday night; will continue to Moscow and Muscat after.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 11-year-old Bnei Brak girl dies of wounds from Iranian cluster bomb on Passover eve
outlets.summary: 11-year-old girl dies from wounds sustained in April 1 Iranian cluster-bomb strike. Brings Israeli civilian toll higher. IDF drone shot down over Tyre. Defense Minister Katz: Israel 'prepared to renew' war.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah fires towards Israel; Iran lays mines in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Live updates: IDF kills Hezbollah operative near Kounine. Touline airstrike kills 2. Hezbollah rocket barrage intercepted. Netanyahu declared cancer-free.

outlets.name: Tasnim News Agency
outlets.headline: Araghchi's trip to Islamabad is not for negotiations with Americans
outlets.summary: Tasnim (IRGC-linked) downplays US talks: 'No negotiations with the Americans on the agenda.' Araghchi's trip is for Pakistani bilateral consultations and to end war. Signals possible IRGC resistance to negotiations.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: FM Araghchi arrives in Islamabad for bilateral consultations; will continue to Moscow and Muscat
outlets.summary: Iran confirms Araghchi's trip but frames as bilateral consultations with Pakistan on 'US/Israeli regime war imposed on Iran.' Trip extends to Moscow and Muscat. US envoys expected Saturday.
